/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_custom_msgs/msg/detail/lidar_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/my_custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_custom_msgs/msg/detail/lidar_datas__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/galactic/lib: /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
